site.name: Gratitude
hero.subheadline: Gratitude turns every checkout and every touchpoint in your property into a digital tipping opportunity. Tablet at the front desk, QR codes in rooms, card payments anywhere. Your staff earns more. You never handle a penny.
problem.heading: Tips are disappearing. Gratitude is not.
problem.body: 48% of adults no longer carry cash. In an industry where staff turnover exceeds 70% annually, tips represent a critical incentive for retaining your best talent. Yet most hotels offer guests no simple way to leave a digital gratuity.
problem.body2: The result? Staff lose hundreds of euros monthly in tips never received. Satisfaction declines. Turnover rises. And management lacks the tools to measure or fairly distribute this revenue stream.
problem.quote: 70% of hotel guests would tip more if a digital tipping solution were available.
problem.stat1.label: of adults carry no cash
problem.stat2.label: annual turnover in hospitality
problem.stat3.label: tips lost daily without digital
solution.heading: Gratitude: digital tipping integrated with your PMS
solution.body: Gratitude is not a standalone app. It is a complete platform that integrates natively with your property management system, posts the tip as a VAT-exempt charge to the room folio, and handles every aspect from collection at the front desk to distribution on payroll.
solution.tablet.title: Tablet at the Front Desk
solution.tablet.body: The operator sends the bill to the tablet. The guest reviews their charges, selects the tip amount — or dedicates it to a specific member of staff — and confirms. The tip is posted to the room folio automatically.
solution.qr.title: QR Codes Throughout the Property
solution.qr.body: Room, restaurant, bar, spa, pool: wherever you place a Gratitude QR code, guests can leave a tip from their phone. Card payment via Stripe. No app required.
features.f1.title: Checkout with integrated tipping
features.f1.desc: Guests view their bill on an elegant touch tablet. They choose their tip with a single tap: percentage, fixed amount, or "no thank you". Everything charged automatically to the room folio, VAT-exempt.
features.f2.title: QR codes everywhere in your property
features.f2.desc: Generate custom QR codes for rooms, departments, individual staff or points of sale. Guests scan and pay by card, Apple Pay or Google Pay. Each QR has its own analytics.
features.f3.title: Real-time dashboard
features.f3.desc: Everything under control: daily tips, monthly trends, staff rankings, guest feedback. Access protected with two-factor authentication. Differentiated roles. WebSocket updates, zero refreshing.
features.f4.title: Fair and transparent distribution
features.f4.desc: Two modes: fixed percentage by department or proportional to hours worked. Complete workflow: automatic calculation, director approval, payment confirmation. Every cent is tracked.
features.f5.title: Reports ready for your accountant
features.f5.desc: Automatic generation of reports compliant with Italian tax law. VAT exemption under Art. 15 DPR 633/72 applied automatically. Professional PDF export and CSV compatible with Mexal.
features.f6.title: Integrated with your PMS
features.f6.desc: Native connection with Passepartout Welcome. Reservation lookup, tip posting, automatic reversal. No tip is ever lost, even if the PMS is temporarily offline.
features.f7.title: Feedback integrated into the tipping flow
features.f7.desc: 1-5 star rating and optional comment, collected at the moment of peak guest satisfaction. Sentiment analysis, trends over time, alerts for critical comments.
features.f8.title: 8 languages, zero barriers
features.f8.desc: Italian, English, German, French, Spanish, Arabic, Russian and Chinese. The interface adapts automatically to the guest's language.
how.step1.title: Set up in one day
how.step1.desc: We install Gratitude on your infrastructure, configure departments, upload staff profiles and connect your PMS. Your team receives dedicated training.
how.step2.title: The guest receives their bill
how.step2.desc: At checkout, the operator sends the bill to the tablet. Or at any point during the stay, the guest scans a Gratitude QR code in the property.
how.step3.title: Choosing the tip
how.step3.desc: The guest selects the amount with a tap. They can dedicate it to a specific member of staff, leave feedback and request a receipt by email. All in under 30 seconds.
how.step4.title: Automatic distribution
how.step4.desc: The tip is charged to the room folio (or paid by card via QR). Management approves the distribution from the dashboard. Every member of staff receives their share fairly and transparently.

social.industry_quote: Hotels adopting digital tipping report a 14% average increase in tipping frequency and a 45% increase in average tip amount per employee.
social.industry_source: Hotel Dive / Wyndham Digital Tipping Report
final_cta.heading: Ready to turn gratitude into value?
final_cta.subheading: Discover how Gratitude can increase your staff's earnings, reduce turnover and simplify tip management. Personalised demo, no commitment.
final_cta.below: No contract required. Set up in one day. Dedicated support.
